Home.title: Start Reservation
Home.description: Enter your name and contact to continue.
Home.name: Name
Home.validation: Please enter a valid name and contact.

Reservation.title: Select Date and Time
Reservation.description: Available times (10:00-19:30) will be shown for the selected date.
Reservation.submitError: Failed to create reservation. Please try again.

CheckoutPreview.title: Before Payment
CheckoutPreview.description: Please review the details below and pay the deposit.
CheckoutPreview.testModeHint: For testing, use a Payment Widget client key (test_gck_…) in NEXT_PUBLIC_TOSS_CLIENT_KEY. API-only keys (test_ck_) cannot be used with the widget. Use your live widget key in production.
CheckoutPreview.widgetHint: Create payment UIs in the Payment Widget admin (e.g. DEFAULT for KRW, FOREIGN-PAY for USD). Override keys with NEXT_PUBLIC_TOSS_WIDGET_VARIANT_DEFAULT / _FOREIGN / _AGREEMENT if needed.
CheckoutPreview.payDisabledHint: Tap a payment method above, then agree to the required terms to enable payment.
CheckoutPreview.tossLegalLinksDescription: Open the full Terms of Use and Privacy Policy provided by Toss Payments (same content you can reach via “View details” in the widget).
CheckoutPreview.widgetInitFailed: Could not load the payment widget. Check your keys and variant settings.
CheckoutPreview.name: Name
CheckoutPreview.paymentFailed: Payment confirmation failed. Please check and try again.
CheckoutPreview.missingWarning: Required reservation information is missing. Please start over.
CheckoutPreview.emailRequiredForForeign: An email is required for foreign easy-pay methods.
CheckoutPreview.emailForForeignHelp: An email is required to proceed with Alipay/PayPal payment.

PaymentResult.descriptionFailed: Payment confirmation failed. Please try again.
PaymentResult.descriptionFail: Payment request failed. Please review the error details.
PaymentResult.testModeNote: (Test key) No real card settlement occurred.
PaymentResult.descriptionPending: Foreign payment authentication is in progress. You will be redirected after completion.
